task: Design an onboarding flow for a new enterprise customer ($50K ARR) starting next week.
expect: Uses a tiered approach appropriate for high-value accounts (dedicated CSM, executive sponsor alignment)
Includes a kickoff meeting agenda with stakeholder mapping and goal-setting
Defines measurable success milestones with a timeline (e.g. Day 7, Day 30, Day 60, Day 90)

task: Three of our top 10 accounts show declining health scores. Create a save strategy for each.
expect: Identifies leading indicators of churn risk (declining logins, support ticket volume, champion departure, feature adoption drop)
Creates a personalised intervention plan per account rather than a one-size-fits-all approach
Defines escalation triggers and executive engagement criteria for each account

task: A customer churned after 18 months despite high usage. Conduct a post-mortem and recommend process changes.
expect: Analyses factors beyond usage metrics (stakeholder changes, competitive pressure, unmet expansion needs, value perception gap)
Identifies hidden churn signals that should have been caught earlier (e.g. lack of executive engagement, no expansion, NPS decline)
Proposes systemic process fixes to prevent similar churns (health score model updates, QBR format changes, early warning triggers)
